name: mfc_cmd_ui_enable_always
description: MfcCmdUI::EnableAlways enables a command UI item unconditionally.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the mfc_cmd_ui_enable_always VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x431a80 validates pCmdUI->Enable(TRUE).
The native smoke calls MfcCmdUI::EnableAlways through a typed fake command UI and verifies Enable(TRUE).
